allow: Bash(git add index.html en/index.html theseus/index.html sitemap.xml)
Bash(ls -la "D:\\AI\\ob1-serie-c-dev\\docs"" && echo "==== DATA FILES ====" && ls -la "D:AIob1-serie-c-devdocsdata.json" 2>/dev/null || echo "data.json not found ")
Bash(git add docs/index.html docs/css/style.css docs/js/app.js docs/manifest.json docs/icons/icon-192.svg)

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''docs/data.json'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(''Keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''Last update:'', d.get\(''last_update''\)\); opps=d.get\(''opportunities'',[]\); print\(''Total:'', len\(opps\)\); print\(''Sample keys:'', list\(opps[0].keys\(\)\) if opps else ''none''\); print\(''---''\); [print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in o.items\(\) if k in [''player_name'',''age'',''ob1_score'',''opportunity_type'',''market_value'',''role'',''role_name'',''current_club'',''recommendation'',''id'']}, ensure_ascii=False\)\) for o in opps[:3]]")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./docs/data.json''\); console.log\(''Keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''Last update:'', d.last_update\); const o=d.opportunities||[]; console.log\(''Total:'', o.length\); if\(o[0]\) console.log\(''Sample keys:'', Object.keys\(o[0]\)\); o.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(x=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\({name:x.player_name,age:x.age,score:x.ob1_score,type:x.opportunity_type,value:x.market_value,role:x.role,role_name:x.role_name,club:x.current_club}\)\)\)")
Bash(git add scripts/ouroboros_run.py docs/index.html docs/js/app.js docs/css/style.css .github/workflows/ingest.yml)

Bash(python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert\(0, str\(Path\(''scripts/ouroboros_run.py''\).resolve\(\).parent.parent\)\); from src.scraper_global import GlobalScraper; print\(''OK: src.scraper_global''\)")
